metadata.title: Don't Stop (2001 Remaster)
metadata.lyrics:
[00:18.23] If you wake up and don't want to smile
[00:21.55] If it takes just a little while
[00:25.99] Open your eyes and look at the day
[00:29.65] You'll see things in a different way
[00:33.44] Don't stop thinking about tomorrow
[00:37.53] Don't stop, it'll soon be here
[00:42.19] It'll be better than before
[00:45.96] Yesterday's gone, yesterday's gone
[00:51.36] 
[00:58.35] Why not think about times to come?
[01:02.28] And not about the things that you've done
[01:06.23] If your life was bad to you
[01:10.51] Just think what tomorrow will do
[01:14.31] Don't stop thinking about tomorrow
[01:17.94] Don't stop, it'll soon be here
[01:21.76] It'll be better than before
[01:26.53] Yesterday's gone, yesterday's gone
[01:32.10] 
[01:54.43] All I want is to see you smile
[01:58.64] If it takes just a little while
[02:04.82] I know you don't believe that it's true
[02:06.98] I never meant any harm to you
[02:10.43] Don't stop thinking about tomorrow
[02:14.64] Don't stop, it'll soon be here
[02:19.43] It'll be better than before
[02:22.99] Yesterday's gone, yesterday's gone
[02:26.75] Don't stop thinking about tomorrow
[02:30.89] Don't stop, it'll soon be here
[02:34.94] It'll be better than before
[02:38.69] Yesterday's gone, yesterday's gone
